seal_recipe: SHA-256 over each task's spec.md, reference.lm, and hidden_tests.mjs. Each file is one hash-input entry: relative_path_from_repo_root + NUL byte + raw file bytes + NUL byte. All entries across every task in the shard are concatenated in path-sorted (lexicographic, forward-slash) order, then hashed once. See PREREGISTRATION_v1.md (Shard design) for the held_out recipe and its Addendum 1 for the metamorphic shard's explicit repo-root-relative-path disambiguation. Reproduced and verified by bench/promptgreen/seal_check.mjs.

dev.role: iteration: debug the harness, author-integration, and prompting; never an observation

metamorphic.role: memorization control: semantics-preserving transforms of held_out, one variant each

extended.role: v2 corpus, staged for the >= 100-task scale-up (docs/LUMEN_UNIVERSAL_COVERAGE_PLAN.md section 4)
